testCases.description: Tests basic saveToLocalStorage and loadFromLocalStorage functionality
testCases.methodology: Automated Node.js test with mocked localStorage
testCases.successCriteria: Data saves successfully and loads with identical structure

testCases.description: Verifies application loads defaults when localStorage is empty
testCases.successCriteria: Returns null for non-existent keys, allowing app to use defaults

testCases.description: Tests checkQuota function returns valid storage information
testCases.methodology: Automated validation of quota calculation logic
testCases.successCriteria: Quota object contains valid used, available, and percentage values

testCases.description: Tests graceful handling of corrupted JSON in localStorage
testCases.methodology: Insert invalid JSON, attempt to load, verify auto-recovery
testCases.successCriteria: Returns null, logs error, auto-clears corrupted data

testCases.description: Verifies FormField array structure persists correctly
testCases.methodology: Save 3-field array, load, validate structure and values
testCases.successCriteria: All fields load with correct id, label, type, value, required

testCases.description: Tests per-case form data storage and isolation
testCases.methodology: Save multi-case form data object, verify case-specific loading
testCases.successCriteria: Each case ID maps to correct form data, no cross-contamination

testCases.description: Validates all BAMF keys use correct bamf_ prefix
testCases.methodology: Scan all localStorage keys, verify prefix convention
testCases.successCriteria: All BAMF-related keys start with bamf_

testCases.methodology: Call detection function, validate boolean return

testCases.description: Browser-based visual test suite with 7 automated tests
testCases.methodology: Open HTML file in browser, click Run All Tests, observe results
testCases.successCriteria: All 7 tests pass, storage info displays correctly
testCases.manualInstructions: Open temp/test-localstorage.html in browser and click 'Run All Tests'

testCases.testName: Form Fields Persistence Across Page Refresh
testCases.description: End-to-end test of form field persistence in live application
testCases.methodology: Add fields via UI, verify in DevTools, refresh, verify restoration
testCases.successCriteria: Fields persist across page refresh with all properties intact

testCases.description: Validates per-case form data isolation when switching cases
testCases.methodology: Fill forms in multiple cases, switch between them, verify data isolation
testCases.successCriteria: Each case maintains separate form data, no cross-contamination

testCases.description: Tests warning system when localStorage approaches quota limit
testCases.methodology: Artificially fill storage to 4.5MB+, trigger save, observe warning
testCases.successCriteria: Warning toast displays, save succeeds, user notified

testCases.description: End-to-end test of malformed JSON auto-recovery in live app
testCases.methodology: Manually corrupt localStorage, refresh, observe recovery
testCases.successCriteria: App loads with defaults, corrupted data cleared, no crash

testCases.description: Documents POC limitation: no real-time sync between browser tabs
testCases.methodology: Open app in 2 tabs, modify in one, observe other tab behavior
testCases.successCriteria: No auto-sync, refresh loads latest, last write wins

testCases.description: Tests export and import functionality for localStorage backup
testCases.methodology: Export data, clear storage, import backup, verify restoration
testCases.successCriteria: Export creates valid JSON, import restores all data

testCases.description: Browser console diagnostics for localStorage health check
testCases.methodology: Run test-console.js script in browser console, review output
testCases.successCriteria: All BAMF keys listed, data integrity checks pass, usage healthy

filesModified: src/contexts/AppContext.tsx (added localStorage persistence via useEffect hooks)
keyFeatures: Automatic quota checking (warns at 4.5MB, prevents at 4.9MB)

executionNotes: All unit and integration tests executed successfully in Node.js environment
Manual tests require browser execution for full validation
Visual test suite (test-localstorage.html) provides interactive browser testing
Console diagnostics (test-console.js) available for live app inspection

knownLimitations: No real-time sync between browser tabs (POC phase limitation)
Data stored in plain text (not encrypted for POC)

recommendations.recommendation: Implement storage event listeners for cross-tab sync
recommendations.rationale: Would improve UX when users have multiple tabs open

recommendations.recommendation: Add data compression for large form arrays
recommendations.rationale: Could reduce storage usage by 50%+ for text-heavy data
Would simplify updates when FormField structure changes

recommendations.recommendation: Add encryption for sensitive form data

conclusion: NFR-003 implementation is complete and all automated tests pass successfully. The localStorage utility module provides robust error handling, quota management, and graceful fallbacks. Integration with AppContext enables automatic persistence of form fields and per-case form data. Manual testing instructions are provided for browser-specific validation.
